prompt: Create a luminous vertical anime-style close-up illustration of an ethereal androgynous young man named unnamed water spirit floating on his back in clear shallow water, viewed from above at a slight diagonal. He has very pale skin, delicate features, long wet icy blue hair spread through the water with one thick braid crossing down the lower center, soft blue-gray eyes half open, long lashes, and a dreamy parted-mouth expression while one slender hand rests near his lips. He wears a loose translucent white kimono robe that blends into the rippling water. Surround him with exactly two orange-and-white koi fish, one near the upper right and one near the lower left, exactly three white lotus blossoms, one large at the bottom foreground, one at the left side, and one partially visible near the upper right, plus exactly seven clear floating water bubbles catching highlights. The mood is serene, fragile, and beautiful, with sparkling caustic light patterns across his face, hair, robe, and the water surface. Use a cool blue and white palette with subtle peach accents on the koi, ultra-detailed anime rendering, fine hair strands, glassy reflections, soft watercolor-like transparency, high-key lighting, gentle bloom, no text, no border, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a luminous vertical anime-style close-up illustration of an ethereal androgynous young man named unnamed water spirit floating on his back in clear shallow water, viewed from above at a slight diagonal. He has very pale skin, delicate features, long wet icy blue hair spread through the water with one thick braid crossing down the lower center, soft blue-gray eyes half open, long lashes, and a dreamy parted-mouth expression while one slender hand rests near his lips. He wears a loose translucent white kimono robe that blends into the rippling water. Surround him with exactly two orange-and-white koi fish, one near the upper right and one near the lower left, exactly three white lotus blossoms, one large at the bottom foreground, one at the left side, and one partially visible near the upper right, plus exactly seven clear floating water bubbles catching highlights. The mood is serene, fragile, and beautiful, with sparkling caustic light patterns across his face, hair, robe, and the water surface. Use a cool blue and white palette with subtle peach accents on the koi, ultra-detailed anime rendering, fine hair strands, glassy reflections, soft watercolor-like transparency, high-key lighting, gentle bloom, no text, no border, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张明亮的竖版动漫风格特写插画，描绘一位名为 无名水灵 的空灵中性化年轻男子，他仰面漂浮在清澈的浅水中，从上方略带对角线的视角观察。他皮肤苍白，五官精致，长长的湿润 冰蓝色 头发在水中散开，其中一根粗辫子横穿下半部中心，柔软的 蓝灰色 双眼半睁，长睫毛，表情梦幻且嘴唇微张，一只纤细的手靠近唇边。他身穿一件宽松透明的 白色和服长袍，与涟漪的水面融为一体。在他周围精确布置两条橙白相间的锦鲤，一条在右上角附近，一条在左下角附近；精确布置三朵白莲花，一朵大的在底部前景，一朵在左侧，一朵在右上角附近部分可见；外加精确七个捕捉到高光的透明漂浮水泡。氛围宁静、脆弱且美丽，焦散光图案闪烁在他的脸部、头发、长袍和水面上。使用冷蓝色和白色调，锦鲤上带有微妙的桃色点缀，超精细动漫渲染，细致的发丝，玻璃般的反射，柔和的水彩画般透明感，高调照明，柔和光晕，无文字，无边框，无水印。
